section_name: Failure of person charged with misdemeanor under this chapter to comply with court-ordered directives; suspension of license

markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.391 — Failure of person charged with misdemeanor under this chapter to comply with court-ordered directives; suspension of license

A person charged with the commission of a misdemeanor under this chapter who fails to comply with all of the directives of the court is subject to the provisions of s. 322.245 .

subsections.text: A person charged with the commission of a misdemeanor under this chapter who fails to comply with all of the directives of the court is subject to the provisions of s. 322.245 .
